name: Shandong Bailong Chuangyuan Bio-Tech Co., Ltd.
summary: Shandong Bailong Chuangyuan Bio-Tech Co., Ltd. is a Chinese company specializing in the production and sale of fructooligosaccharides (FOS) and other prebiotics, used as functional food ingredients. Their products are used in food, beverage, and pharmaceutical applications, aiming to improve gut health and nutrition. The company is located in Shandong Province, China.
